# dnsmasq preflight validation report
# registry: docs/reference/network-registry.yaml
# generated: 2026-06-18T13:58:59+10:00

## reid
### zone.conf
# This file is generated. Edit network-registry.yaml and rerun the generator.
# Registry: docs/reference/network-registry.yaml
# Site filter: reid
# Domain: reid.home.arpa

domain=reid.home.arpa
local=/reid.home.arpa/
expand-hosts
interface=eth0
bind-interfaces
addn-hosts=/etc/dnsmasq.d/generated/reid/authoritative.hosts
conf-file=/etc/dnsmasq.d/generated/reid/aliases.conf
conf-file=/etc/dnsmasq.d/generated/reid/reverse.conf

### dhcp.conf
# This file is generated. Edit network-registry.yaml and rerun the generator.
# Registry: docs/reference/network-registry.yaml
# Site filter: reid
#
# Generation policy:
# - DHCP served only on the chosen interfaces
# - Fixed leases generated only for hosts with a usable MAC and a usable service IP
# - Address preference is lan, then wifi, then legacy forms
# - One preferred MAC is chosen for multi-homed hosts

interface=eth0
bind-interfaces
dhcp-authoritative

dhcp-range=10.1.1.200,10.1.1.249,255.255.255.0,12h
dhcp-option=option:router,10.1.1.1
dhcp-option=option:dns-server,10.1.1.3
dhcp-option=option:domain-search,reid.home.arpa
domain=reid.home.arpa,10.1.1.0/24

# Fixed leases generated from registry
# router (primary, lan, category=network)
dhcp-host=50:91:e3:38:03:e9,router,10.1.1.1
# vdsl-modem (primary, lan, category=network)
dhcp-host=10:13:31:57:fa:00,vdsl-modem,10.1.1.2
# mudpi (ethernet, lan, category=infrastructure)
dhcp-host=88:a2:9e:6e:8c:d4,mudpi,10.1.1.3
# abbhub (primary, lan, category=energy)
dhcp-host=00:04:a3:f3:2d:fe,abbhub,10.1.1.6
# haswell (ethernet, lan, category=infrastructure)
dhcp-host=fc:aa:14:5b:5a:23,haswell,10.1.1.10
# shorepi (ethernet, lan, category=infrastructure)
dhcp-host=d8:3a:dd:2a:25:3f,shorepi,10.1.1.20
# printserver (primary, lan, category=server)
dhcp-host=88:a2:9e:19:07:69,printserver,10.1.1.30
# cam-01 (primary, lan, category=camera)

## farm
### zone.conf
# This file is generated. Edit network-registry.yaml and rerun the generator.
# Registry: docs/reference/network-registry.yaml
# Site filter: farm
# Domain: farm.home.arpa

domain=farm.home.arpa
local=/farm.home.arpa/
expand-hosts
interface=eth0
bind-interfaces
addn-hosts=/etc/dnsmasq.d/generated/farm/authoritative.hosts
conf-file=/etc/dnsmasq.d/generated/farm/aliases.conf
conf-file=/etc/dnsmasq.d/generated/farm/reverse.conf


### hosts.conf
# This file is generated. Edit network-registry.yaml and rerun the generator.
# Registry: docs/reference/network-registry.yaml
# Site filter: farm
# Domain: farm.home.arpa

# ap1 short-name (lan)
address=/ap1/192.168.0.100
# ap1 top-level canonical (lan)
address=/ap1.farm.home.arpa/192.168.0.100
# ap2 short-name (lan)
address=/ap2/192.168.0.194
# ap2 top-level canonical (lan)
address=/ap2.farm.home.arpa/192.168.0.194
# farm-router short-name (lan)
address=/router/192.168.0.1
# farm-router top-level canonical (lan)
address=/router.farm.home.arpa/192.168.0.1
# shedpi top-level canonical (lan)
address=/shedpi.farm.home.arpa/192.168.0.210
# sunnyboy1 short-name (lan)
address=/sunnyboy1/192.168.0.147
# sunnyboy1 top-level canonical (lan)
address=/sunnyboy1.farm.home.arpa/192.168.0.147
# sunnyboy2 short-name (lan)
address=/sunnyboy2/192.168.0.206
# sunnyboy2 top-level canonical (lan)
address=/sunnyboy2.farm.home.arpa/192.168.0.206
# sunnyboy3 short-name (lan)
address=/sunnyboy3/192.168.0.223
# sunnyboy3 top-level canonical (lan)
address=/sunnyboy3.farm.home.arpa/192.168.0.223
# sunnyisland short-name (lan)
address=/sunnyisland/192.168.0.250
# sunnyisland top-level canonical (lan)
address=/sunnyisland.farm.home.arpa/192.168.0.250
# weatherstation short-name (lan)
address=/weatherstation/192.168.0.179
# weatherstation top-level canonical (lan)
address=/weatherstation.farm.home.arpa/192.168.0.179

### aliases.conf
# This file is generated. Edit network-registry.yaml and rerun the generator.
# Registry: docs/reference/network-registry.yaml
# Site filter: farm
# Domain: farm.home.arpa

# sunnyisland alias (lan)
address=/barkingisland/192.168.0.250
# sunnyboy1 alias (lan)
address=/barkingisland1/192.168.0.147
# sunnyboy2 alias (lan)
address=/barkingisland2/192.168.0.206
# sunnyboy3 alias (lan)
address=/barkingisland3/192.168.0.223
# shedpi alias (lan)
address=/shedpi/192.168.0.210

### reverse.conf
# This file is generated. Edit network-registry.yaml and rerun the generator.
# Registry: docs/reference/network-registry.yaml
# Site filter: farm
# Domain: farm.home.arpa

ptr-record=1.0.168.192.in-addr.arpa,router.farm.home.arpa
ptr-record=100.0.168.192.in-addr.arpa,ap1.farm.home.arpa
ptr-record=147.0.168.192.in-addr.arpa,sunnyboy1.farm.home.arpa
ptr-record=179.0.168.192.in-addr.arpa,weatherstation.farm.home.arpa
ptr-record=194.0.168.192.in-addr.arpa,ap2.farm.home.arpa
ptr-record=206.0.168.192.in-addr.arpa,sunnyboy2.farm.home.arpa
ptr-record=210.0.168.192.in-addr.arpa,shedpi.farm.home.arpa
ptr-record=223.0.168.192.in-addr.arpa,sunnyboy3.farm.home.arpa
ptr-record=250.0.168.192.in-addr.arpa,sunnyisland.farm.home.arpa

### authoritative.hosts
# This file is generated. Edit network-registry.yaml and rerun the generator.
# Registry: docs/reference/network-registry.yaml
# Site filter: farm
# Domain: farm.home.arpa

192.168.0.1 router.farm.home.arpa router
192.168.0.100 ap1.farm.home.arpa ap1
192.168.0.147 sunnyboy1.farm.home.arpa sunnyboy1
192.168.0.179 weatherstation.farm.home.arpa weatherstation
192.168.0.194 ap2.farm.home.arpa ap2
192.168.0.206 sunnyboy2.farm.home.arpa sunnyboy2
192.168.0.210 shedpi.farm.home.arpa shedpi
192.168.0.223 sunnyboy3.farm.home.arpa sunnyboy3
192.168.0.250 sunnyisland.farm.home.arpa sunnyisland

### dhcp.conf
# This file is generated. Edit network-registry.yaml and rerun the generator.
# Registry: docs/reference/network-registry.yaml
# Site filter: farm
#
# Generation policy:
# - DHCP served only on the chosen interfaces
# - Fixed leases generated only for hosts with a usable MAC and a usable service IP
# - Address preference is lan, then wifi, then legacy forms
# - One preferred MAC is chosen for multi-homed hosts

interface=eth0
bind-interfaces
dhcp-authoritative

dhcp-range=192.168.0.230,192.168.0.249,255.255.255.0,12h
dhcp-option=option:router,192.168.0.1
dhcp-option=option:dns-server,192.168.0.210
dhcp-option=option:domain-search,farm.home.arpa
domain=farm.home.arpa,192.168.0.0/24

# Fixed leases generated from registry
# farm-router (primary, lan, category=network)
dhcp-host=a8:42:a1:e9:ad:d4,farm-router,192.168.0.1
# ap1 (primary, lan, category=network)
dhcp-host=74:83:c2:7b:35:6f,ap1,192.168.0.100
# sunnyboy1 (primary, lan, category=energy)
dhcp-host=00:40:ad:af:c3:ee,sunnyboy1,192.168.0.147
# weatherstation (primary, lan, category=sensor)
dhcp-host=7c:9e:bd:78:c4:58,weatherstation,192.168.0.179
# ap2 (primary, lan, category=network)
dhcp-host=78:45:58:ed:73:dd,ap2,192.168.0.194
# sunnyboy2 (primary, lan, category=energy)
dhcp-host=00:40:ad:af:f5:7f,sunnyboy2,192.168.0.206
# shedpi (ethernet, lan, category=infrastructure)
dhcp-host=e4:5f:01:78:f6:62,shedpi,192.168.0.210
# sunnyboy3 (primary, lan, category=energy)
dhcp-host=00:40:ad:af:f6:d9,sunnyboy3,192.168.0.223
# sunnyisland (primary, lan, category=energy)
dhcp-host=00:40:ad:b5:00:f8,sunnyisland,192.168.0.250

### warnings_dns.txt

# Generated from: docs/reference/network-registry.yaml
# Site filter: farm

### leases-summary.txt
# generated lease summary
# Registry: docs/reference/network-registry.yaml
# Site filter: farm
# Include unscoped hosts: no

192.168.0.1      a8:42:a1:e9:ad:d4  farm-router           (farm-router, primary, lan, network)
192.168.0.100    74:83:c2:7b:35:6f  ap1                   (ap1, primary, lan, network)
192.168.0.147    00:40:ad:af:c3:ee  sunnyboy1             (sunnyboy1, primary, lan, energy)
192.168.0.179    7c:9e:bd:78:c4:58  weatherstation        (weatherstation, primary, lan, sensor)
192.168.0.194    78:45:58:ed:73:dd  ap2                   (ap2, primary, lan, network)
192.168.0.206    00:40:ad:af:f5:7f  sunnyboy2             (sunnyboy2, primary, lan, energy)

192.168.0.250    00:40:ad:b5:00:f8  sunnyisland           (sunnyisland, primary, lan, energy)

### summary.txt
# dns publication summary
# Registry: docs/reference/network-registry.yaml
# Site filter: farm
# Domain: farm.home.arpa
